	+ (x^92 + 90*x^91 + 4008*x^90 + 117744*x^89 + 2566680*x^88 + 44278992*x^87 + 629632240*x^86 + 7589517696*x^85 + 79154091348*x^84 + 725507452520*x^83 + 5916316503792*x^82 + 43351294750080*x^81 + 	- (x+1)^65;
q := (1+x)/x;
t := 1 / ((y+1)*(x+1));
E:=[(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P:=[-t,t^2];
